rationale: No new qualitative events directly affecting Romania; EU accession and Black Sea security continue as decaying background signals.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Moldova's EU accession process — directly relevant to Romania's eastern neighborhood — continues but no new step this cycle; remains important regional background.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romanian households indirectly, but no final agreement reached this cycle.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Continued background signal for Romania's Black Sea security; no new direct incident or escalation this cycle.
